title: holttumochloa korbuensis
intro: Holttumochloa korbuensis is a species of grass in the family Poaceae, native to Malaysia. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Holttumochloa korbuensis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used in the form of a topical application or a powder for various herbal preparations.
